creator: ale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Eygene Ryabinkin ha scritto:
> I propose to split the recent VuXML entry for PHP,
>    http://www.vuxml.org/freebsd/b2a6fc0e-070f-11e0-a6e9-00215c6a37bb.html
> into multiple ones.

Actually, the vulnerabilities should point to the correct ports, not 
php5 in general: an imap, zip or phar bug are only present if php5-imap, 
php5-zip or pecl-phar are present.

-- 
Alex Dupre
